title: Annotations
description: The Mod That Brings More Fun, Gear, Armor and more!
body:
Annotations is a mod that adds many things going from the legendary Mjolnir to a recipe that allows you to smoke rotten flesh into leather, Our Goal is to make this mod add as much as possible to make the game as fun and big as possible! So everyday day we will work on updating the mod and will try to add as much as we can in as short as we can without making it a buggy mess. We highly Recommend using Jei with this mod as it helps you with the recipes.
Also available on CurseForge: (under review)
